ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_POC_Validation_Rules__c), ISPICKVAL(Product_Family_for_PoC__c, "1-Yr Subscription to Rubrik Cloud Data Management for Azure 1TB raw, incl support"), VALUE(TEXT(POC_Qty__c)) < 12,$Profile.Name <> "Rubrik Data Migration Admin" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Min quantity is 12 when selecting Rubrik Cloud Data Management for initial cluster
